# terry.so

> AI Agent、Swift 原生开发与开发者工具的实践笔记。拆 SDK、造轮子、记踩坑。

Personal tech blog by Terry So (NEE), a fullstack developer focused on AI Agent
tooling and Swift / macOS native development. Posts document SDK internals,
Agent architectures, and developer tools — written in Chinese with code in English.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Recent posts, terminal-style index of all articles.
- [About](/about): Author bio, open-source projects, and links.
- [Tags](/tags): Browse posts by topic.

## Optional

- [GitHub](https://github.com/terryso): Open-source projects.
- [Twitter / X](https://x.com/suchuanyi): Updates and short notes.
